pokemon:stoutland.name: Stoutland
pokemon:stoutland.summary: Being wrapped in its long fur is so comfortable that a person would be fine even overnight on a wintry mountain.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Being wrapped in its long fur is so comfortable that a person would be fine even overnight on a wintry mountain.
It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold.
Being wrapped in its long fur is so comfortable that a person would be fine even overnight on a wintry mountain.
With this wise Pokémon, there could be no concern that it would ever attack people. Some parents even trust it to babysit.
It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold.
Stoutland is immensely proud of its impressive moustache. It’s said that moustache length is what determines social standing among this species.
Intelligent, good-natured, and valiant, it’s a trustworthy partner on rescue teams.
These Pokémon seem to enjoy living with humans. Even a Stoutland caught in the wild will warm up to people in about three days.
Its fur is long and thick. A long time ago in cold regions, every household kept a Stoutland.
It pays no mind to the cold, thanks to its long warm coat. Stoutland in Alola look a little uncomfortable.
This extremely wise Pokémon excels at rescuing people stranded at sea or in the mountains.
Being wrapped in its long fur is so comfortable that a person would be fine even overnight on a wintry mountain.
It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold.
Being wrapped in its long fur is so comfortable that a person would be fine even overnight on a wintry mountain.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Being wrapped in its long fur is so comfortable that a person would be fine even overnight on a wintry mountain.

pokemon:herdier.name: Herdier
pokemon:herdier.summary: It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.
It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.
This very loyal Pokémon helps Trainers, and it also takes care of other Pokémon.
This Pokémon obeys its master’s orders faithfully. However, it refuses to listen to anything said by a person it doesn’t respect.
This very loyal Pokémon helps Trainers, and it also takes care of other Pokémon.
The black fur that covers this Pokémon’s body is dense and springy. Even sharp fangs bounce right off.
Its dense black fur grows continuously. The high cost of keeping its hard fur properly groomed makes this a troublesome Pokémon to train.
Herdier is a very smart and friendly Pokémon. So much so that there’s a theory that Herdier was the first Pokémon to partner with people.
It has been living with people for so long that portrayals of it can be found on the walls of caves from long, long ago.
The longer its black fur grows, the harder and more impervious it gets. Claws and fangs can’t easily penetrate it.
It loyally follows its Trainer’s orders. For ages, they have helped Trainers raise Pokémon.
This very loyal Pokémon helps Trainers, and it also takes care of other Pokémon.
This very loyal Pokémon helps Trainers, and it also takes care of other Pokémon.
It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.

pokemon:lillipup.name: Lillipup
pokemon:lillipup.summary: Though it is a very brave Pokémon, it’s also smart enough to check its foe’s strength and avoid battle.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Though it is a very brave Pokémon, it’s also smart enough to check its foe’s strength and avoid battle.
It faces strong opponents with great courage. But, when at a disadvantage in a fight, this intelligent Pokémon flees.
Though it is a very brave Pokémon, it’s also smart enough to check its foe’s strength and avoid battle.
The long fur surrounding its face functions as radar, enabling it to probe the condition of its battle opponents.
The long hair around its face provides an amazing radar that lets it sense subtle changes in its surroundings.
This Pokémon is far brighter than the average child, and Lillipup won’t forget the love it receives or any abuse it suffers.
Because it doesn’t yelp, it’s extremely popular with Trainers who live in apartment buildings.
This Pokémon is courageous but also cautious. It uses the soft fur covering its face to collect information about its surroundings.
This Pokémon is popular with beginners because it’s intelligent, obedient to its Trainer’s commands, and easy to raise.
This Pokémon has excellent judgment. If it decides it can’t defeat an opponent, it immediately turns tail and vamooses.
The long hair around its face provides an amazing radar that lets it sense subtle changes in its surroundings.
Though it is a very brave Pokémon, it’s also smart enough to check its foe’s strength and avoid battle.
The long hair around its face provides an amazing radar that lets it sense subtle changes in its surroundings.
Though it is a very brave Pokémon, it’s also smart enough to check its foe’s strength and avoid battle.

loreSummary: Though it is a very brave Pokémon, it’s also smart enough to check its foe’s strength and avoid battle.
